svg.title: SlipIQ Bot Architecture — Full API Stack with Failsafes
svg.desc: Complete bot architecture showing data flow from stats sources through model layer to output, with redundancy and failsafe routing across all APIs
svg.text: ① trigger
② slate check (0 credits)
if down
if down
③ stats pull — model inputs (no credits)
sport-specific · all free · no API credits consumed
→ all stats written to local cache JSON
④ primary odds pull · 3 credits

g.text: Pinnacle + DraftKings + Fanatics + PrizePicks · 3 credits · all books one call

svg.text: → write full response to cache · timestamp recorded
⑤ odds failsafe chain — fires only if ParlayAPI returns null/error
⑥ sharp line validation + historical anchor
testing only
⑦ cache layer — gate before every model run

g.text: props · sharp lines · stats · timestamps · stale threshold: 90 min

svg.text: fresh → skip API call
stale → trigger refresh
⑧ model layer — projection engine (local · no credits)
→ model projection vs Pinnacle no-vig baseline → flag if edge > threshold
⑨ EV scan + confidence score — selective · 10 credits each

g.text: Best book for each pick · 3 cr

svg.text: ⑩ F5 + period markets — 2 credits each

g.text: F5 MLB · Q1 NBA · 1H soccer · Pinnacle + DK + Fanatics

if fresh
→ skip
⑫ pre-game · 60 min before first pitch/tip

svg.text: ⑬ post-game · sharp review · closing line log

daily budget: ~35-50 credits · monthly: ~900-1,100 cr · free tier ceiling: 1,000 cr · Starter $5/mo = 20,000 cr
